lastRunSummary: Built Game 54: Smoke Signal - timed smoke pattern generation, hold-duration mechanic, 68 tests pass.

gameQueue.title: Cattle Baron
gameQueue.concept: Resource management and territory expansion. Buy land parcels at auction, graze cattle to build value, defend against drought and rustlers. Turn-based economic strategy with risk/reward tradeoffs across 10 rounds. First territory-expansion economic strategy in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First turn-based territory strategy (buy/graze/defend), first multi-round economic arc with compounding returns, first risk-layered resource management (drought probability increases with overgrazing)

gameQueue.title: Dead Eye
gameQueue.concept: Wind-drift shooting gallery. Aim a crosshair against continuous wind pull, lead moving targets across a frontier backdrop, and time shots to score hits before targets escape. Three target types (still/slow/fast) with escalating wind and density. First precision aiming + wind compensation mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First ballistic aiming with continuous wind drift (crosshair pushed laterally, player compensates), first lead-target prediction mechanic, first gallery-shooter format

gameQueue.title: Canyon Run
gameQueue.concept: First-person perspective obstacle runner. Sprint down a canyon as boulders, tumbleweeds, and cacti loom out of the vanishing point. Obstacles scale from small to large using perspective projection and must be dodged left/right. Speed escalates across 5 stages. First pseudo-3D perspective scaling in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First pseudo-3D depth illusion (objects grow from center vanishing point using perspective math), first reflex-based first-person runner (not narrative like Wanted: Dead or Alive or Stampede), first frame-rate-independent obstacle approach system

runLog.summary: Built Game 43: Wanted: Reward - visual search + composite matching, 4-trait crowd silhouettes, economic payout, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 44: Trail Blaze - player-drawn pathfinding, 5 terrain types, A* comparison, escalating threats, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 45: Rattlesnake Round-Up - multi-phase hold+drag snake wrangling, thermal scope view, 3 snake tiers, 24 tests pass.
Built Game 46: Prairie Telegraph - semaphore relay chain, 26-letter visual alphabet, hex direct-selector UI, wind gusts, 25 tests pass.
Built Game 47: Outlaw Auction - hidden-value bounty bidding, 5 behavioral AI rivals, bankroll management, 36 tests pass.
Built Game 48: Hangman's Bluff - interrogation deception, lie memory, 3-stage sheriff checkpoint, 37 tests pass.
Built Game 49: Lariat Spin - rotational rope physics, momentum-accumulation + precision-release, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 50: Tin Pan Alley - melody-completion piano puzzle, musical phrase-memory mechanic, 47 tests pass.
Built Game 51: Pinkerton Trail - stealth pursuit tailing, suspicion meter, evidence collection, 47 tests pass.
Built Game 52: Frontier Forge - blacksmith 3-phase crafting (heat/strike/quench), material state simulation, 63 tests pass.
Built Game 53: Dust Bowl Derby - top-down vehicular demolition derby, dual-resource engine heat + body damage, 66 tests pass.
Built Game 54: Smoke Signal - timed smoke pattern generation, hold-duration mechanic, 68 tests pass.
